testCase.name: Layout component renders correctly with a matched route (e.g. /home)
Layout component renders correctly with /products route
Layout component renders correctly with /invitalia-products route
Layout component renders correctly with /producers route
Layout component renders correctly with /uploads route
Layout component renders correctly with a non-matched route (e.g. /privacy-policy)
Layout component renders correctly with /tos route (maxWidth 100%)
Layout component hides assistance info when on /assistance route
Layout component shows assistance info when not on /assistance route
Layout component calls customExitAction when Header exit is triggered
Layout component calls customExitAction when Footer exit is triggered
Layout component clears only filter, user, and token items from sessionStorage on exit
Layout component does not remove other keys from localStorage
Layout component does not remove other keys from sessionStorage
Layout component removes items with keys starting with "persist:"
Layout component removes items with keys containing "filter" (case insensitive)
FiltersDrawer renders header and close button; clicking close closes the drawer
FiltersDrawer shows "producer" Select when user is INVITALIA
FiltersDrawer hides "producer" Select when user is NOT INVITALIA
FiltersDrawer changes status via Select and enables "delete filters" after interaction
FiltersDrawer changes batch via Select
FiltersDrawer changes category via Select
FiltersDrawer types in eprel/gtin inputs and calls setters with trimmed values
FiltersDrawer enables "filter" button when at least one filter is set
FiltersDrawer enables "delete filters" after interaction and invokes callbacks
FiltersDrawer filter button is disabled when all filters are empty
FiltersDrawer filter button triggers callbacks when enabled and clicked
FiltersDrawer delete filters button is enabled when errorStatus=true even if no interaction/filters
FiltersDrawer whitespace-only inputs do not enable filter button (trim)
FiltersDrawer batch select renders all provided options
FiltersDrawer category select shows exactly PRODUCTS_CATEGORY keys
FiltersDrawer onClose of Drawer triggers toggleFiltersDrawer(false)
getChipColor (real constants, no mock) returns expected colors for each known status
getChipColor (real constants, no mock) returns default for unknown/null/undefined
FiltersDrawer – validazioni & azioni blocca il filtro con EPREL non numerico e mostra helper
FiltersDrawer – validazioni & azioni blocca il filtro con GTIN non valido e mostra helper
FiltersDrawer – validazioni & azioni accetta EPREL/GTIN validi, applica i filtri e chiude
FiltersDrawer – validazioni & azioni onPaste rimuove gli spazi e non mostra errori
FiltersDrawer – filtro status per ruolo nasconde WAIT_APPROVED e SUPERVISED per utenti non Invitalia
FiltersDrawer – onClose reset dei draft ripristina i draft ai filtri applicati quando si chiude il Drawer
getChipColor (real constants, no mock) – aspettative corrette match mappa reale
getChipColor (real constants, no mock) – aspettative corrette default per valori ignoti
ProductDetail.extra renders chronology + formalMotivation blocks when present (non OPERATORE)
ProductDetail.extra Invitalia L1 + SUPERVISED: shows accept/reject buttons; confirm approve calls waitApproved API and waitApproved message
ProductDetail.extra Invitalia L1 + UPLOADED: open Supervised modal then close (not cancelled) triggers onUpdateTable/onClose; success triggers onShowSupervisedMsg
ProductDetail.extra Invitalia L2 + WAIT_APPROVED: shows AcceptApprovation and RejectApprovation flows
ProductDetail.extra Confirm dialog approve on UPLOADED calls waitApproved API and shows waitApproved (prefers onShowWaitApprovedMsg over onShowApprovedMsg)
ProductDetail.extra Exclude flow (L1 + UPLOADED): opening and success triggers onShowRejectedMsg via handleSuccess
AddProducts Component renders component correctly
AddProducts Component renders form section correctly
AddProducts Component handles file upload interaction
AddProducts Component displays correct breadcrumb structure
AddProducts Component component handles theme correctly
AddProducts Component accessibility attributes are present
AddProducts Component handles back button click and navigation
AddProducts Component handles back button click when onExit does not execute callback
AddProducts Component formRef is properly connected to FormAddProducts
AddProducts Component passes correct props to FormAddProducts
AddProducts Component renders main container with correct data-testid
AddProducts Component manual link has correct href when EIE_MANUAL is defined
AddProducts Component manual link click is not prevented when EIE_MANUAL is defined
AddProducts Component manual link prevents default when EIE_MANUAL is not defined
AddProducts Component manual link prevents default when EIE_MANUAL is empty string
AddProducts Component fileAccepted state changes correctly
ProductActionButtons Rendering conditions should return null when isInvitaliaUser is false
ProductActionButtons Rendering conditions should return null when status is undefined
ProductActionButtons Rendering conditions should return null when status is empty string
ProductActionButtons Rendering conditions should return null when both isInvitaliaUser is false and status is undefined
ProductActionButtons Non-REJECTED status (but not APPROVED) should render Ripristina and Escludi buttons when status is PENDING
ProductActionButtons Non-REJECTED status (but not APPROVED) should render Ripristina and Escludi buttons when status is DRAFT
ProductActionButtons Non-REJECTED status (but not APPROVED) should call onRestore when Ripristina button is clicked in non-REJECTED status
ProductActionButtons Non-REJECTED status (but not APPROVED) should call onExclude when Escludi button is clicked in non-REJECTED status
ProductActionButtons REJECTED status should render only Ripristina button when status is REJECTED
ProductActionButtons REJECTED status should call onRestore when Ripristina button is clicked in REJECTED status
ProductActionButtons Component structure and styling should render with correct MUI components structure for APPROVED status
ProductActionButtons Component structure and styling should render with correct MUI components structure for REJECTED status
ProductActionButtons Edge cases should handle unknown status values as non-REJECTED
ProductActionButtons Edge cases should handle case-sensitive status comparison
OverviewHistoryUpload renders correctly in loading state
OverviewHistoryUpload shows data correctly when API succeeds
OverviewHistoryUpload shows error message when API fails
OverviewHistoryUpload shows InfoUpload when uploadStatus is UPLOADED
OverviewHistoryUpload does not show InfoUpload when uploadStatus is not UPLOADED
OverviewHistoryUpload calls getProductFilesList with correct initial parameters
OverviewHistoryUpload handles empty content array correctly
OverviewHistoryUpload handles null content correctly
OverviewHistoryUpload handles undefined content correctly
OverviewHistoryUpload InfoUpload component renders with correct props
OverviewHistoryUpload renders error state with empty table
OverviewHistoryUpload useEffect dependency array works correctly
InvitaliaProductsList renders InstitutionInfoCard and ProductGrid
InvitaliaProductsList handles missing institution gracefully
EprelLinks renderizza il link se eprelCode è valido
EprelLinks renderizza solo Typography con emptyData se eprelCode è stringa vuota
EprelLinks renderizza solo Typography con emptyData se eprelCode è undefined
EprelLinks renderizza solo Typography con emptyData se eprelCode è null
useLogin hook userFromJwtToken should correctly convert JWT token to User object
useLogin hook userFromJwtTokenAsJWTUser should correctly convert JWT token to IDPayUser object
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle mock user scenario
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should redirect to login when no token is present
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle empty session storage user
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should use existing session storage user
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle getUserPermission success in mock scenario
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle getUserPermission error in mock scenario
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle getUserPermission error with empty session storage
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle getUserPermission error with existing session storage user
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle empty string token
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle undefined token
useLogin hook hook return value should return attemptSilentLogin function
App routing and gating renders Auth page at /auth (top-level route)
App routing and gating shows TOSWall inside TOSLayout when TOS not accepted (and not on /privacy or /tos)
App routing and gating returns empty fragment when TOS status is undefined (and not on /privacy or /tos)
App routing and gating allows navigating to Privacy and TOS pages even if TOS not accepted
App routing and gating renders Invitalia routes when user is Invitalia (HOME and PRODUCERS, and * redirect)
App routing and gating renders Standard routes when user is standard; passes organizationId from store; covers * redirect
Products rende il ProductDataGrid con l’organizationId passato
Products non rende i children (il componente non li supporta)
RolePermissionService getUserPermission calls API and returns data
RolePermissionService getPortalConsent calls API and returns data
RolePermissionService savePortalConsent calls API with versionId
store configuration usa i reducer corretti, applica persistReducer con la whitelist e disattiva il serializableCheck
store configuration include il logger quando LOG_REDUX_ACTIONS è true
categoryList should contain all expected categories with correct labels and values
downloadCsv should create a blob with BOM and trigger download with correct filename
ProductDataGrid.helpers getSelectedStatuses filters and preserves order
ProductDataGrid.helpers isAllStatus works for true and false
ProductDataGrid.helpers isSomeStatus works for true and false
ProductDataGrid.helpers getStatusChecks detects allUploaded, allSupervised, allWaitApproved, someUploaded and length
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: APPROVED when all UPLOADED
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: WAIT_APPROVED when all UPLOADED
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: SUPERVISED when all UPLOADED shows waitApproved message
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: Invitalia WAIT_APPROVED when all SUPERVISED
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: Invitalia APPROVED when all SUPERVISED
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: Invitalia REJECTED with all UPLOADED resets all messages
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: REJECTED or REJECT_APPROVATION shows rejected when not covered by earlier branches
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: default path sets approved when no branch matches
Helper functions formattedCurrency with undefined
Helper functions formattedCurrency with number (no cents)
Helper functions formattedCurrency with number and cents = true
Helper functions formatDate with undefined
Helper functions formatDate with valid date
Helper functions formatIban with valid IBAN
Helper functions formatIban with undefined
Helper functions formatDateWithHours with valid ISO string
Helper functions formatDateWithoutHours with valid ISO string
Helper functions formatDateWithoutHours with empty string
Helper functions formatFileName with long name
Helper functions formatFileName with short name
Helper functions formatFileName with undefined
Helper functions truncateString with long string
Helper functions truncateString with short string
Helper functions truncateString with undefined
Additional tests for better coverage formattedCurrency with zero
Additional tests for better coverage formattedCurrency with cents = false explicitly
Additional tests for better coverage formatDateWithHours with null
Additional tests for better coverage formatDateWithHours with undefined
Additional tests for better coverage truncateStringResponsive with undefined string
Additional tests for better coverage truncateStringResponsive with undefined maxLength
Additional tests for better coverage truncateStringResponsive with string longer than maxLength
Additional tests for better coverage truncateStringResponsive with string shorter than maxLength
Additional tests for better coverage fetchUserFromLocalStorage with valid user data
Additional tests for better coverage fetchUserFromLocalStorage with no user data
Additional tests for better coverage fetchUserFromLocalStorage with invalid JSON
Additional tests for better coverage initUploadBoxStyle has correct properties
Additional tests for better coverage initUploadHelperBoxStyle has correct properties
Additional tests for 100% coverage formatDateWithHours with empty string
Additional tests for 100% coverage formatDateWithHours with valid ISO string
Additional tests for 100% coverage formatDateWithHours with invalid date string
Additional tests for 100% coverage getTablePrLength with window defined
Additional tests for 100% coverage getTablePrLength without window
Additional tests for 100% coverage useResponsiveMaxLength with different breakpoints
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with undefined
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with empty string
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with future date
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with past date
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with today date
Additional tests for 100% coverage customExitAction clears storage and redirects
Additional tests for 100% coverage formattedCurrency with number 0 and cents true
Additional tests for 100% coverage formattedCurrency with custom symbol
